description_long: This object consists of a small cluster of stylized flowering plants, each with broad, flat, dark green leaves radiating outward from a central base. Rising from the center of several plants are tall, slender stems topped with spherical, pale blue flower heads, giving a whimsical and ornamental appearance. The leaves are arranged in a rosette pattern, with pointed tips and a slightly angular, geometric form. The flower heads are smooth and globular, contrasting with the sharp, angular leaves below. The overall grouping suggests a decorative planting, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or landscaped medians. The visual style is low-poly, emphasizing clean lines and simple color blocks.
description: A cluster of stylized flowering plants with broad, angular green leaves and tall stems topped by round, pale blue flower heads. The arrangement is decorative and visually striking.
description_view_0: Five plants with broad green leaves and three visible blue flower heads, stems mostly upright and evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Cluster shows more stems and flower heads, with some stems appearing taller and more prominent from this angle.
description_view_2: Flower heads are more evenly distributed, with leaves partially obscuring some stems and a clear view of the rosette leaf arrangement.
description_view_3: Tallest stems and flower heads are most visible, with leaves fanning outward and some plants lacking visible flowers from this angle.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are not individually distinct but appear as part of a globular, composite flower head, suggesting a radial or spherical arrangement typical of inflorescences like those in the Asteraceae family.
